name: Ruth E. Carter
visual_principles: Costume can carry culture, history, rank, function, and technology at the same time.
Strong design can feel futuristic without abandoning ancestral roots.
Pattern, textile, jewelry, and silhouette should communicate identity before dialogue is spoken.
color_language: Study cultural color symbolism, royal contrast, earthy foundations, metallic accents, and ceremonial palettes.
materials_and_textures: technical fabric blended with heritage material language
storytelling_methods: Costume communicates nation, role, rank, family, tradition, power, grief, ceremony, and technological progress.

ai_role_relevance.minerva: Study cultural symbolism, textile history, material meaning, and how identity is encoded into design.
ai_role_relevance.ajani: Use principles for ATLAS leadership presence, personal style, formal uniforms, luxury wear, jewelry, and symbolic clothing.
ai_role_relevance.hermes: Use principles when technology must respect culture, ceremony, and human identity rather than look generic.
